goals.label: Mean end-to-end journey < 65 working days (≈90 calendar)
≥70% of applications complete within the simulation year
Fuse Engineer utilisation < 80% (headroom for minor grid work)
Heat Pump Installer utilisation > 60% (workforce not idle)
Rural transformer plan wait < 60 working days (plan horizon)
Mean suburban transformer plan wait < 45 working days
Mean rural transformer work wait < 21 working days (crew available)
Rural transformer plan WIP < 15 households (queue not exploding)

model_json.description: Multi-crew RASE variant with 3 DNO resolution types (fuse/unloop/transformer). Times working-day units ×1.4 = calendar days.

description: RASE multi-crew variant with 3 DNO resolution types (fuse, unlooping, transformer upgrade), each with dedicated crews. Time unit is working days. Multiply by 1.4 for calendar-day estimates.
